preferred_translation: gladness tied to the household life
definition: MN 137's category of gladness bound to acquisition, recollection, and household-side attraction to sense objects.
notes: Use this record for the household-side gladness family in MN 137. Keep the household tie explicit rather than flattening the line into generic worldly pleasure or simple happiness. The point is a class of gladness still conditioned by obtaining, recalling, and valuing attractive sense objects.

example_phrases.translation: six gladnesses tied to the household life
example_phrases.notes: Category label in the thirty-six positions section of MN 137.

authority_basis.scope: Supports the household-side gladness family in the six-fields analysis.

translation_policy.default_scope: Use this as the standard English label for the gehasita somanassa category in MN 137 unless a recorded local reason requires minor grammatical adjustment.
translation_policy.when_not_to_apply: Do not flatten the category into generic pleasure or happiness language that loses the household-side tie.
translation_policy.drift_risk: Prevents the MN 137 category from drifting into vague worldly-pleasure language or dropping the household-side distinction.
